'''[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] Koyo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial commandoes|commando]] who served in the Second Platoon, B Company of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Imperial Special Operations|Special Ops]] [[Ghost Battalion]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he participated in the [[Subjugation of Sulon]] and his team under [[First Lieutenant/Legends|First Lieutenant]] [[Brazack]] stormed into the [[Katarn family compound|Katarn homestead]] with orders to capture [[Morgan Katarn]]. It was Koyo who kicked the door open and then with [[Santo (soldier)|Santo]] opened the doors to the workshop, triggering a defensive reaction of the home droid [[WeeGee]].

As at that time their target was out, Morgan witnessed the intrusion safely from afar. The team returned to [[Vengeance (Imperial-class, Jerec)|their base]] empty-handed.
